test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient. BattleSimGuiLiveTest covers first-show in-client visibility and modal launch chains for the affected BattleSim dialogs, TacticalGuiLiveTest covers the ICM Done button and post-selectWeapon rebuild sizing, and GuiTests passed (27 tests).
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate. AGENTS.md captures the wxGTK dialog sizing/centering convention and post-rebuild resize rule, and doc/UsersGuide.md matches the shipped centered/auto-growing ICM dialog behavior.
